rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated intellectual grounding is prior JMR-overview pieces (e.g., Huber et al. 2014), not this specific spillover study. The only match evidence here is a bare DOI reference entry with no contextual citation text, which is consistent with an incidental/listing-style mention of one article in the reviewed corpus rather than substantive use.
